blockers: aragora gauntlet --local exits 1 at 25% progress with no user-visible error - still needs a fix to surface the failure path
Full Arena orchestrator cannot run offline with demo agents - Tier-1 ablation still uses standalone aragora-debate
recommended_next_steps: Tier-2: run SWE-bench-lite harness on full Arena using the rotated OpenAI key + OpenRouter Opus 4.7 fallback
Pin DECLARED_MODEL_PINS in harness config; record actual routed model in each debate receipt
Add --mock-agents to gauntlet so offline smoke tests cover that code path
Regain Anthropic account access and rotate ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to enable direct-provider path (currently routed through OpenRouter)
resolved_2026-04-17: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 401: now auto-falls-back to anthropic/claude-opus-4.7 via OpenRouter at every call site
OPENAI_API_KEY 429: rotated via scripts/secrets_manager.py rotate OPENAI_API_KEY
OPENROUTER_API_KEY: rotated proactively alongside the OpenAI key
google-generativeai missing: no longer required; Gemini agent routes to google/gemini-3.1-pro via OpenRouter
aragora demo without --offline: still times out, but is now a UX bug not a capability gap - all providers resolve to frontier pins via OpenRouter

security_posture_2026-04-17.anthropic_key_leaked_to_high-gravity: auto-revoked by Anthropic 2026-04-07; no active exposure
security_posture_2026-04-17.gitleaks_pre_commit: installed at pre-commit AND pre-push stages

phase_b_flag_ablation.note: 10/10 flags timed out; full aragora Arena cannot run a deterministic 3-demo-agent 1-round debate within 30s. Use aragora-debate standalone for Tier-1 ablation.

aragora demo.error: Debate timed out after 30s; README advertises this as the one-line demo but it silently tries real LLMs and hits stale keys
aragora demo.remediation: README should document `--offline` as the no-key path; `aragora demo --offline` works and produces a receipt in ~1s

aragora demo --offline.notes: Produces DR-MOCK-* receipt with SHA-256 hash, 4 mock agents, 2 rounds, 74% confidence. Receipt saved to ./aragora-demo-receipt.json

aragora gauntlet --local --profile quick.remediation: Either (a) document that gauntlet requires a valid Anthropic/OpenAI key even with --local, or (b) add a --mock-agents option that mirrors `demo --offline` for gauntlet
aragora gauntlet --local --profile quick.symptom: Stops at 25% progress (Stress Testing); no receipt written to --output path; exits 1 with no user-visible error

aragora quickstart --demo.notes: Produces quickstart-demo-* receipt in 0.0s; opens HTML preview in browser

implications_for_benchmark: Tier-1 ablation harness must run against the standalone aragora-debate package (Debate class). Full Arena orchestrator drags in network calls, pipeline stages, and an execution gate even for pure demo agents, blocking offline ablation.

Tier-2 end-to-end harness requires (a) rotating Anthropic and OpenAI keys in .env, (b) installing google-generativeai, and (c) either fixing the silent-failure path in `aragora gauntlet --local` or routing through OPENROUTER_API_KEY as the sole functional provider.

The README's 'pip install aragora && aragora demo' headline is factually incorrect on the current build; demo falls back to real LLMs and times out without --offline. This should be fixed before any commercial measurement because it's the first command a new user runs.
